title: ATUMTEK 12" Ring Light with Tripod Stand, 63" Extendable, 3 Light Modes & 10 Brightness Levels, LED Selfie Light with Remote Control for TikTok, YouTube, Live Streaming, Photography
features: Enhanced Selfie & Video Quality – The 12" ring light provides bright, even, and flicker-free lighting that eliminates harsh shadows, highlights facial features, and delivers professional-looking selfies, videos, and live streams.

Customisable Lighting Options – Features 3 colour temperatures (Warm, Natural, Cool) from 2700K–7000K and 10 brightness levels (500–800 lumens). Easily adjust the light to match your skin tone, mood, or shooting environment.

Stable & Height-Adjustable Tripod – The extendable tripod stand adjusts from 17" to 63", made of sturdy aluminium alloy with secure toggle locks. Keeps your ring light steady for photography, makeup, and streaming.

Flexible Angle & Phone Mount – 360° rotatable base and 180° tilt head let you find the perfect angle. Place your smartphone at the centre of the ring for flattering, shadow-free lighting in every shot.

Convenient Power & Remote Control – Equipped with 160 long-lasting LED beads, powered by any 5V/2A USB source (laptop, power bank, adapter). Includes a Bluetooth remote shutter compatible with iOS and Android for hands-free control.
description: Product Description The ring light is not only suitable for content creators but also photographers, makeup artists, and anyone who wants to look better in Zoom meetings. The soft diffused light helps reduce shadows and hide wrinkles and blemishes. Previous page Next page The base upon which the light sits can turn 360 degrees around and you can pivot the light 180 degrees up or down, which ensures you get the perfect angle to decrease shadows when taking a photo or lighting yourself during virtual meetings. By placing your smartphone in the center of the ring, you minimize shadows and get flattering light that seems to come from everywhere, without creating harsh lines or distracting reflections. Previous page Next page 1 Flexible Phone Clamp 2 180° Rotatable 3 360° Adjustable Previous page Next page 1 For Selfies 2 For Makeup 3 For FaceTime The 12-inch size of the ring light provides a good balance between portability and functionality, making it a great choice for taking selfies and videos as well. A Bluetooth remote is included for added convenience if you place it at a distance.
